content: We can refactor Case-Based Reasoning (CBR) retrieval and reuse workflows to run on a persistent multi-turn Agent MemoryBank, turning isolated problem-solving case collections into dynamic, context-aware memory that accumulates interaction-specific nuance across a user’s entire engagement with an AI agent. This enables CBR to draw not just on generic past problem cases, but on tailored, context-rich interaction history to deliver more personalized solution adaptation.
